local_research_question: Which analytical methods best surface predictive biomarkers for RA outcomes using the manually extracted MIMIC-IV dataset?
executive_summary: Evaluated Methods 1-4 on RA (ICD-9 714.x). GP (pop=500, gen=100) is the only method beating LR baseline on both AUC-ROC (0.6715) and AUC-PR (0.0179). All methods converge on RDW, PLT, MCHC as top features. LLM identified correct features but lacked multiplicative structure. CBC-only signal for RA is weak (~1-2% precision at 1% prevalence).
key_result: GP beats baseline on both metrics; feature consensus across methods
